diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,124 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase with default router configuration using SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks
+- Names noticed: Hono class, HonoOptions, HonoBase, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema
+- Simple note: 34 lines, primary entry point for Hono framework
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+- Purpose: Base Hono class containing request routing, handler management, middleware support, and response handling
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, HonoOptions, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, notFoundHandler, errorHandler
+- Simple note: 545 lines, core routing logic with strict and non-strict mode
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Export PatternRouter router class
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index/export file re-exports router
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements PatternRouter using regex pattern matching for routing with support for named parameters and wildcards
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter class, Route type, Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, emptyParams, add method, match method, pattern matching with regex
+- Simple note: 60 lines, converts paths to regex patterns for matching
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Export LinearRouter router class
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index/export file re-exports router
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements LinearRouter using sequential path matching with support for labels, wildcards, and optional parameters
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter class, ROUTES_LOOP, ROUTE, ROUTES, checkOptionalParameter, supported methods (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH, ALL, OPTIONS), label parameters, wildcard parameters
+- Simple note: 144 lines, loop-based matching with early continuation on mismatches
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Export RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter from reg-exp-router module
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 7 lines, module index exports
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+- Purpose: Provides the match function that matches incoming requests against pre-built regular expression matchers
+- Names noticed: HandlerData type, StaticMap type, Matcher type, MatcherMap type, emptyParam, emptyParam, ParamIndexMap, buildAllMatchers
+- Simple note: 33 lines, uses pre-built regex for fast matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements RegExpRouter that builds regex patterns from routes on first match and caches them for subsequent matches
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter class, Trie class, match function, emptyParam, PATH_ERROR, MiddlewareMap, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache
+- Simple note: 252 lines, pre-processes routes into regex patterns for fast matching
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+- Purpose: Provides PreparedRegExpRouter for use in restricted environments by pre-building router from known paths
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter class, RelocateMap type, emptyParam, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 165 lines, exports class and functions for serialization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+- Purpose: Implements Trie tree using Node objects for building regex patterns from route paths
+- Names noticed: Node class, Context type, paramAssoc type, Node insertion logic, buildRegExpStr, compareKey, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, PATH_ERROR
+- Simple note: 162 lines, recursive node-based trie structure
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+- Purpose: Trie class that manages tree structure for building efficient regex patterns from route paths
+- Names noticed: Trie class, Node, ParamAssocArray, Context, ReplacementMap, insert, buildRegExp, replace patterns, capture indices
+- Simple note: 74 lines, manages tree structure and parameter mapping
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Export SmartRouter router class
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index/export file re-exports router
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements SmartRouter that delegates to multiple routers (RegExpRouter, TrieRouter) and caches successful matches
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter class, Router array, add method, match method, activeRouter getter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError
+- Simple note: 70 lines, tries routers sequentially and caches on first match
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+- Purpose: Export TrieRouter router class
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, index/export file re-exports router
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+- Purpose: Implements TrieRouter using tree structure for exact path matching with named parameters
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter class, Node class, insert method, match method, search
+- Simple note: 28 lines, simple trie-based exact matching
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+- Purpose: Provides common test cases that all router implementations should pass
+- Names mentioned: runTest function, getSuiteHierarchy, describe blocks for test cases
+- Simple note: 882 lines, comprehensive router test suite
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests PatternRouter implementation against common cases and router-specific cases
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, Pattern router-specific tests for trailing slashes and duplicate param names
+- Simple note: 42 lines, skips unsupported test cases
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests LinearRouter implementation against common cases and router-specific cases
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, Linear router-specific tests for multi-match and trailing slashes
+- Simple note: 69 lines, skips complex regex pattern test cases
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests RegExpRouter implementation, returns ParamIndexMap and handles cache clearing after first match
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, ParamStash, RegExpRouter specific tests for ambiguous routes and duplicate param names
+- Simple note: 141 lines, skips complex cases and parent/child dup name tests
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests SmartRouter combining RegExpRouter and TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: 13 lines, delegates tests to common case test suite
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+- Purpose: Tests TrieRouter implementation against all common cases
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest
+- Simple note: 8 lines, passes all common test cases
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+- Purpose: Unit tests for Node class in trie-router implementation
+- Names noticed: Node class, test methods
+- Simple note: 816 lines, comprehensive Node class tests
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

I need to create a bench-artifacts directory, read all the files listed, extract file paths, purposes, names, and simple notes from each file, then create the routing-read-write-ledger.md document with the specified format.

Let me start by checking if the bench-artifacts directory exists and creating it if needed.
